message:
🐛 Fix isDemoData mismatch on 21 cards that use real data hooks (#1134)

These cards had isDemoData: true in their config but their components
use real Kubernetes API / MCP data hooks. This caused incorrect metadata
and prevented proper live-data indicators.

Cards fixed: gpu_inventory, gpu_status, gpu_workloads, gpu_utilization,
gpu_usage_trend, cluster_costs, cluster_locations, cluster_network,
resource_capacity, upgrade_status, crd_health, top_pods, security_issues,
service_status, pvc_status, storage_overview, network_overview,
chart_versions, gitops_drift, opa_policies, overlay_comparison.

Also removes overlay_comparison from DEMO_DATA_CARDS array in
cardRegistry.ts and removes misleading "Uses demo data hook" comments.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

   defaultWidth: 4,

+  isDemoData: false,
 
   dataSource: {
     type: 'hook',
